manual_user_attendance_checkpoints.operator_observation: A live authorized user must be present before any DevHub page is viewed. This fixture does not authenticate or open a browser.
The operator must stop at any login, CAPTCHA, MFA, payment, submission, certification, cancellation, upload, or official action prompt.

redacted_page_state_summaries.redacted_summary: Expected public navigation chrome and permit-search entry points only; no account, project, parcel-owner, payment, document, or application details are included.
Expected read-only detail layout is represented by neutral labels and empty state notes; this fixture contains no private DevHub data.

selector_confidence_confirmations.basis: Derived from fixture labels only and must be re-confirmed by an attended user before any live read-only pilot use.
Placeholder selector confidence only; no private DevHub DOM, screenshot, trace, or authenticated page content was inspected.
